infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MK Pro needs camera access to photograph jobs before and after completion.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MK Pro needs microphone access for customer video calls.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MK Pro needs your location for job navigation and customer tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MK Pro tracks your location in the background during active jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MK Pro needs photo library access to upload job progress photos.
